title: Buttery Crispy Australian Monkfish Toast
description: This dish combines the buttery texture of monkfish with a crispy exterior reminiscent of traditional toast, making it a nostalgic and delightful breakfast option.
instructions: Mix flour and breadcrumbs in a shallow dish.
In another shallow dish, beat the eggs. Place the monkfish fillets in between two paper towels to absorb any excess liquid.
Coat each fillet with egg first, then coat evenly in breadcrumb mixture, pressing gently for better adhesion.
Heat the melted butter in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Once hot, add the coated fillets and cook until golden brown on both sides (about 3-4 minutes per side).
Transfer to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, arranging the toast-style monkfish in one layer.
Bake for about 10-12 minutes or until the breadcrumbs are crispy. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
